---
title: "ACM/IEEE CSEC2017"
subtitle: "Cybersecurity Curricula 2017"
jurisdiction: "Global"
framework-type: "Pedagogy"
organizing-units: 8
elements: 40
license: "ACM/IEEE educational use"
date: 2026-05-08
categories: [pedagogy, global]
---

## At a glance

| | |
|---|---|
| Steward | Joint Task Force on Cybersecurity Education (ACM, IEEE-CS, AIS, IFIP) |
| Canonical page | [Cybersecurity Curricula 2017](https://cybered.acm.org/) |
| Version | 2017 v1.0 |
| Released | 2017-12-31 |
| Source format | PDF |
| License | Copyright 2017 ACM/IEEE/AIS/IFIP, with permission granted for educational-materials development |
| `framework_summary` slug | `csec2017-v1` |

## Structure in cybed: terms

::: {.column-page}

```{=html}
<figure class="schema-diagram">
<button type="button" class="toggle-all" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Toggle schema names for all elements"><span class="toggle-icon" aria-hidden="true">▸</span><span class="toggle-text">schema names</span></button>
<svg viewBox="0 0 460 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-labelledby="csec-structure-title">
  <title id="csec-structure-title">CSEC2017 structural mapping</title>
  <defs><marker id="csec-arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8.5" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.55"/></marker></defs>
  <g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.55">
    <line x1="230" y1="58" x2="230" y2="100" marker-end="url(#csec-arrow)"/>
    <line x1="230" y1="170" x2="230" y2="212" marker-end="url(#csec-arrow)"/>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Framework">
    <rect x="150" y="20" width="160" height="40" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="230" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Framework</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">csec:Framework</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Knowledge area">
    <rect x="70" y="100" width="320" height="70" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.16)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="230" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Knowledge area</text>
    <text class="lp" x="230" y="151" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.65">(curricular thought-model grouping)</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">csec:KnowledgeArea</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:OrganizingUnit</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="161" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.55">(no cybed:Role)</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Topic">
    <rect x="150" y="212" width="160" height="60" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="230" y="247" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Topic</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="237" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">csec:Topic</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:RoleElement</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Framework-to-knowledge-area connection">
    <text class="ep" x="238" y="84" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">contains</text>
    <text class="et" x="238" y="84" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasOrganizingUnit</text>
  </g>
  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Knowledge-area-to-topic connection">
    <text class="ep" x="238" y="196" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">has element</text>
    <text class="et" x="238" y="196" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasElement</text>
  </g>
</svg>
<figcaption>CSEC2017's Knowledge Areas are curricular thought-model groupings, not workforce roles. Click any box or edge label to flip between plain English and the technical schema name.</figcaption>
</figure>
```

:::

## Counts

| Measure | Value |
|---|---|
| Knowledge Areas | 8 |
| Strict elements (topics) | 40 |
| With-examples elements | 40 |
| Topics per Knowledge Area | 5.0 |

The Knowledge Area / Topic structure is the framework's
coarse-grained surface. Beneath each topic, CSEC2017 defines further
sub-elements (Essentials and supplementary content) that the current
ingestion captures only at the topic level. Element counts are
therefore a lower bound on what CSEC2017 specifies.

## Provenance

::: {.provenance-cards .column-page}

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-archive"/></svg>

**Source**

CSEC2017 curricular guidelines (the Joint Task Force report from ACM, IEEE-CS, AIS SIGSEC, and IFIP WG 11.8).
:::

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-gear"/></svg>

**Ingestion**

`scripts/010-ingest-csec2017.R` parses the structure into the cybed schema.
:::

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-license"/></svg>

**License**

Subject to ACM/IEEE licensing terms. The package does not bundle the source text. Users stage it locally.
:::

:::

## Caveats

- CSEC2017's KAs are **curricular thought-model groupings, not workforce roles or competency clusters**. Cross-framework comparisons that equate KAs with roles misrepresent the framework's intent.
- Per-topic Essentials and supplementary content are **not materialized as RDF triples**. The strict count reflects only the top-level topic enumeration per Knowledge Area, so headline element-density figures should be read as a floor rather than a ceiling.
- CSEC2017 is a **curricular guideline for university programs, not a hiring specification**. The framework does not encode workforce roles or proficiency levels, so it sits on a different axis from NICE, DCWF, and ECSF in any cross-framework comparison.

## Related

- [Cyber.org K-12](cyberorg-k12.qmd), the K-12 pedagogy peer at a
  different educational level.
- [Cross-framework density spread](../queries/density-spread.qmd)
- [The vocabulary](../concepts/vocabulary.qmd)
